---
title: "Mammals"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

sp_list <- read.csv(here::here("../LaSelva-MetaNetwork-data/data/L1/L1_harmonized_names/mammal_sp_list.csv"))

library(knitr); library(dplyr); library(kableExtra)

sp_list %>%
  arrange(order, family, species) %>%
  distinct(order, family, species) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = "none",
    full_width = FALSE
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::collapse_rows(columns = 1:2)

```
